div1.entryFree:
Achievement, 1) exploit: and for a. offer us his ransom, H5 III, 5, 60. his --s of no less account, H6A II, 3, 8. Troil. I, 3, 181. Hml. I, 4, 21.
2) acquisition: all the soil of the a. (viz of the crown) goes with me into the earth, H4B IV, 5, 190. a. is command; ungained, beseech, Troil. I, 2, 319 (when we have obtained what we wished for, we play the masters; if not, the humble suitors). how my --s mock me, IV, 2, 71.
